basic_details.job_title: MoEF&CC Young Professionals Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change (MoEF&CC)
basic_details.short_information: Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change (MoEF&CC) has released the official Young Professionals Notification 2026. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced under the MoEF&CC Young Professionals Recruitment 2026. Candidates possessing a Postgraduate degree in Environmental Management, Wildlife, Natural Resource Management, Forestry, or allied fields are eligible to apply through Email. The last date for receipt of applications is 21 days from the date of publication of the official notification. The official notification PDF and application details are provided below.

important_dates.last_date_to_apply: 21 days from the date of publication

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate degree in Environmental Management/ Wildlife, Natural Resource Management/ Forestry or allied field.
qualification.details: Young Professional (equivalent to Consultant 'A'): Postgraduate degree in Environmental Management/ Wildlife, Natural Resource Management/ Forestry or allied field. 3-5 years experience in forestry/environmental management, training, digital learning, or project coordination.

salary_details.details: Consolidated monthly fee of Rs. 60,000/- No additional allowances such as Dearness Allowance, Residential Accommodation or CGHS shall be admissible except for those specified in the project guidelines.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for MoEF&CC Young Professionals Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 21 days from the date of publication (27-07-2026)
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: MoEF&CC Young Professionals Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the MoEF&CC Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download MoEF&CC Young Professionals Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: MoEF&CC Young Professionals Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Young Professional (equivalent to Consultant 'A'): Postgraduate degree in Environmental Management/ Wildlife, Natural Resource Management/ Forestry or allied field. 3-5 years experience in forestry/environmental management, training, digital learning, or project coordination.

content_sections.heading: MoEF&CC Young Professionals Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

content_sections.heading: MoEF&CC Young Professionals Salary 2026
content_sections.text: Consolidated monthly fee of Rs. 60,000/- No additional allowances such as Dearness Allowance, Residential Accommodation or CGHS shall be admissible except for those specified in the project guidelines.

content_sections.heading: MoEF&CC Young Professionals Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates

rows.date: 21 days from the date of publication (27-07-2026)

content_sections.heading: MoEF&CC Young Professionals Selection Process 2026
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for MoEF&CC Young Professionals Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 21 days from the date of publication (27-07-2026) Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: MoEF&CC Young Professionals Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the MoEF&CC Young Professionals recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 21 days from the date of publication. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Young Professionals post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Postgraduate degree in Environmental Management, Wildlife, Natural Resource Management, Forestry, or an allied field to be eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for Young Professionals?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Young Professionals position in the Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Young Professionals role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated monthly fee of Rs. 60,000/-. No additional allowances are provided.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. Candidates need to send their complete application and required documents to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q6. What is the required experience for the Young Professionals post?
faq.answer: Applicants should have 3-5 years of experience in forestry, environmental management, training, digital learning, or project coordination.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for the Young Professionals position?
faq.answer: The Young Professionals position is offered on a contractual basis, meaning it is a temporary engagement.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change located?
faq.answer: The Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change is located in New Delhi, with the pincode 110003.
